description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Product Description White synthetic upper with perforations at the toe box Mesh detail at the sides of the midfoot Central laceups Elastication at the backfoot Padded footbed with embossed branding TPU outsole with herringbone grooves and suction points at the forefoot and heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
